## Summary

Briefly describe your change.

## Type of change

- [ ] Book title suggestion only (no links — maintainers attach Drive)
- [ ] Maintainer: add/fix Drive link (must pass `npm run validate:links`)
- [ ] Documentation / structure improvement
- [ ] Library app (`web/`) change
- [ ] CI or repository health

## Checklist

- [ ] Contributors did **not** add example.com or other placeholder links
- [ ] Any URL added is a real `https://drive.google.com/…` (or approved docs host) and passes `cd web && npm run validate:links`
- [ ] Correct language file and skill-level section (when editing docs)
- [ ] No duplicate titles
- [ ] Markdown / UI renders correctly

## Notes

Optional context for reviewers.
